headline: ResultsCX Recognized as a Leader in Everest Group’s Healthcare CXM Intelligent Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026
summary: NORRISTOWN, Pa., April 28, 2026--ResultsCX, a provider of Customer Experience Management (CXM) services to leading global companies including Fortune 100 and FTSE 250 organizations, today announced it has been recognized as a Leader in Everest Group’s Healthcare CXM Intelligent Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026.
